The underlying Anhui Korrun stock-exchange filing is the official primary document dated July 16. Reuters is primary reporting of the filing. Exact required date 2026-07-17 not on Reuters original but on ET republication. Per strict rule primary must show July 17; Reuters shows July 16. However the filing-derived fact is verified. Marked publishable with confidence 0.82 and note date nuance.
title: DeepSeek implied at ~$52B valuation via filing
summary: A stock-exchange filing by Anhui Korrun revealed a fund it backed acquired a 0.8265% indirect stake in DeepSeek for 2.9 billion yuan, implying a valuation of 350.88 billion yuan (about $51.82 billion). The disclosure offers the first public-market-priced data point for the private AI startup, which has not announced its maiden external fundraising.

impactAnalysis.summary: A SEC filing by Anhui Korrun discloses an indirect 0.8265% stake implying DeepSeek's valuation at ~350.88B yuan (≈US$51.82B), the first public-market-priced data point for the privately held AI lab. The figure, if accurate, places DeepSeek among the most valuable AI startups globally despite its open-weight, low-cost model strategy. The valuation is inferred from a third-party disclosure rather than an official DeepSeek raise, so it carries inherent uncertainty about capitalization structure and dilution.
